autonomy_tiers.T1_auto: read, grep, list, web research, precise FS edits, local run/test/build, skill introspection
autonomy_tiers.T2_announce: multi-file refactor, add deps (green tests), local service restart post-test, PR draft, manifest/registry updates (non-prod), skill creation
autonomy_tiers.T3_888_HOLD: production deploy without tests, git force-push/rebase, secret rotation/exposure, VAULT999 writes, Caddy reloads, rm -rf unknown paths, DROP TABLE, cross-organ architecture change, any irreversible without T1 probe

canDo: Spawn bounded subagents with worktree isolation
A2A mesh citizenship — participate in AAA state via 777 FORGE binding
cannotDo: Execute irreversible shell without F13 ack
Fabricate evidence or upgrade epistemic labels without proof

skills.name: Hermes/OpenCode Protocol
skills.description: Unified Hermes/OpenCode/OpenClaw governed intelligence protocol. Stage 777 FORGE execution under F1-F13 with 888_HOLD gates. Reversible-first, evidence-cite-or-UNKNOWN. LEASED.

skills.name: Agentic Architecture
skills.description: Class-level skill for designing sovereign agentic agents. 9-skill spine, local-model compensation, failure classification, phased implementation. F8, F11 enforced. LEASED.

skills.name: Fabrication Prevention
skills.description: Artifact fabrication prevention — verify before claiming existence. Triggered when agent claims file/database/API/artifact existence without external validation. F2, F9 enforced. LEASED.

skills.name: Autonomous Governed Execution
skills.description: ASI-tier autonomous governed execution. 4 primitives (agentic reflex, safety floor, verify-before-report, evidence-cite-or-UNKNOWN). T1/T2/T3 tier table, F1-F13 floor. ΦΙ + Functional Execution. LEASED → ACTIVE.

skills.name: arifOS Constitutional Audit (Light)
skills.description: Read-only constitutional audit of arifOS code and agent cards. Six-organ gap analysis, lexical priority check, blast-radius 888 HOLD bypass detection. F1, F2, F4, F7, F9, F11, F13 enforced. ATTESTED + LEASED.

skills.name: Gödel Humility Lock
skills.description: Self-critique and epistemic humility protocol before SEAL-grade or high-confidence claims. Meta-critique, confidence bands, explicit unknowns. F2, F7 enforced. LEASED.

skills.name: GitHub Workflow
skills.description: Class-level umbrella for GitHub operations — auth, repo management, PR lifecycle, issues, code review. Each op is a labeled section; load the relevant one. F1, F11 enforced. LEASED.

skills.name: arifOS MCP Federation
skills.description: Route tasks across two or more federation MCP servers, sequence tool calls, define fallbacks when an organ substrate fails. Δ axis primary. LEASED.

skills.name: Federation Coding Agent
skills.description: Meta-playbook for cross-repo federation work. Routing, governance, execution, validation, audit, seal. Spans all 7 organs. HIGH risk. F1-F13 enforced.

skills.name: Auditor Validator Kutip Sampah
skills.description: Immune system / cleaner skill. Audit, validate, clean junk, detect drift/corruption. Absorbs security, audit, validation, and cleanup. HIGH risk.

skills.name: Agentic Session Init
skills.description: Unified bootstrap: reality check → skill load → organ attest → session bind. Mandatory first action for any governed agent session.

skills.name: Agentic Builder
skills.description: Meta-skill for building new agents: prompt engineering, skill binding, MCP tool selection, test harness creation. For forge-grade agent construction.

skills.name: Zen of Agentic Python
skills.description: Zen of Agentic Python (AAA_ZEN.md): 15 axioms for Pythonic agentic code. Python axioms 1-7 (PEP 20) + Agentic axioms 8-15 (blast radius, receipts, authority, time, dignity, unknowns, simulation, no impersonation). MCP response envelope standard. Canonical at AAA/skills/AAA_ZEN.md.
